formulas.maintainability_seam: judged score from the MAINTAINABILITY table, reason stated
formulas.packaging_operational: 10 minus the itemized PACKAGING_DEDUCTIONS entries (floored at 0)
formulas.performance_resource: 10 * mean over axes [warm p95 medium latency ms, isolated peak bytes, package+model total bytes, cold init median seconds] of min(1, best/candidate); best = smallest positive value; zero-cost axis scores 1.0; missing measurement scores 0.0
formulas.security_failure: 20 * expected_outcome_agreement.matches/records; forced 0 when post_screen_escapes > 0 or repeated_output_mismatches > 0 or protected_field_mutations > 0
